summary: Round-2 deep front-end audit: find old/pre-doctrine element/container/button/glyph/chip styles across all PYRUS screens, verify against DESIGN.md, synthesize a durable ranked fix list

verified.old_pattern: getSignalLaneTone: BUY -> color: CSS_COLOR.green
verified.canonical_replacement: toneForDirectionalIntent("buy") / SEMANTIC_TONE.directionBuy (CSS_COLOR.blue)
verified.doctrine_rule: SEMANTIC COLOR: blue=buy/bullish; green banned for directional market intent
verified.reason: Line 501 sets BUY lane tone to CSS_COLOR.green for a buy-direction signal; canonical toneForDirectionalIntent/SEMANTIC_TONE.directionBuy=blue exists in semanticToneModel.js.

verified.old_pattern: getUnusualLaneTone: isBullish -> CSS_COLOR.green (632), isCall -> CSS_COLOR.green (636)
verified.canonical_replacement: toneForDirectionalIntent("bullish")/toneForOptionSide -> CSS_COLOR.blue for bullish/call; red kept for bearish/put
verified.doctrine_rule: Green banned for directional intent; call/bullish must be blue
verified.reason: Verified lines 631-636: bullish and call both resolve to CSS_COLOR.green (directional intent); canonical helpers map these to blue.

verified.old_pattern: direction === "call" ? CSS_COLOR.green : direction === "put" ? CSS_COLOR.red : textMuted
verified.canonical_replacement: toneForOptionSide("c") -> SEMANTIC_TONE.directionBuy (CSS_COLOR.blue) for call
verified.doctrine_rule: blue=call/bullish; green banned for directional intent
verified.reason: Line 108-109 uses green for call direction; toneForOptionSide("c") returns SEMANTIC_TONE.directionBuy=blue per semanticToneModel.js line 134.

verified.old_pattern: call share bar span background: hasFlow ? CSS_COLOR.green : border (put bar red at 261)
verified.canonical_replacement: blue (SEMANTIC_TONE.directionBuy) for call segment; SpreadGauge is the fuller call/put-share primitive
verified.doctrine_rule: Green banned for directional intent; hand-rolls call/put split bar
verified.reason: Lines 253/261 hand-roll a two-color call/put bar with green for the call segment; minimum fix is blue for call, SpreadGauge exists in signal-language as the primitive.

verified.old_pattern: toneForFinancialDelta(sector.net) where net = calls - puts; applied to bar fill (96) and value (103)
verified.canonical_replacement: toneForDirectionalIntent(sector.net >= 0 ? "bullish" : "bearish") (blue/red), matching MarketUniverseTable FlowHeatCell:154
verified.doctrine_rule: net call-put flow is directional intent; green banned for direction (must be blue)
verified.reason: Line 24 defines net=calls-puts (directional flow); line 47 colors it green-for-positive via toneForFinancialDelta, whereas the sibling FlowHeatCell (line 154) uses toneForDirectionalIntent (blue) for the identical concept.

verified.old_pattern: {row.net >= 0 ? "▲" : "▼"} {fmtM(...)} raw unicode arrow direction encoder
verified.canonical_replacement: BigDirectionGlyph (signal-language direction glyph)
verified.doctrine_rule: custom ▲▼ direction encoders should use signal-language glyph primitives
verified.reason: Line 166 uses a raw ▲/▼ unicode direction encoder; BigDirectionGlyph exists in signal-language. Caveat: BigDirectionGlyph derives color via getTone("buy")=green from tones.js, so migrating it should also correct that to blue to stay doctrine-compliant.

verified.old_pattern: hand-rolled loading skeleton from multiple <span className="ra-skeleton-shimmer"> blocks (105,126,135,145,155)
verified.canonical_replacement: Skeleton primitive (primitives.jsx:1714), already used in MarketUniverseTable
verified.doctrine_rule: Skeleton primitive replaces hand-rolled shimmer loaders
verified.reason: Verified raw ra-skeleton-shimmer spans at 105/126/135/145/155; Skeleton primitive (which internally emits ra-skeleton-shimmer) exists and is already imported/used in MarketUniverseTable.

verified.old_pattern: raw <input role="combobox"> with inline background:CSS_COLOR.bg1, border, padding, borderRadius styling
verified.canonical_replacement: TextField primitive (primitives.jsx:1411) for surface styling, preserving combobox ARIA + ref
verified.doctrine_rule: TextField/Select replace raw <input> styling
verified.reason: Lines 296-327 hand-style a raw input (bg1/border/padding/radius); TextField primitive exists. Low severity: it is a listbox combobox with rich ARIA (aria-expanded/controls/activedescendant) + ref, so a swap must preserve those, which TextField does not obviously forward today.

verified.old_pattern: gridResizeIdleColor = "rgba(166, 174, 182, 0.38)"; gridResizeHoverColor = "rgba(196, 203, 210, 0.74)"
verified.canonical_replacement: cssColorMix(CSS_COLOR.textMuted, ..) / token-based neutral (cssColorMix already imported)

verified.canonical_replacement: cssColorMix(CSS_COLOR.accent, ..) for the active-selection ring

verified.reason: Lines 1744/1822/1899 hardcode a blue rgba(91,140,255) glow duplicating the accent color; CSS_COLOR.accent + cssColorMix exist. Correction: this is an isActive selection affordance, not banned decorative glow, so the real (low) issue is the raw literal, not the effect itself; recategorized color, not motion.

verified.doctrine_rule: Select replaces raw <select> styling
verified.reason: Confirmed 7 raw <select style={inputStyle(theme)}> occurrences at the cited lines; Select primitive exists.

verified.doctrine_rule: TextField replaces raw <input> styling
verified.reason: Confirmed raw type=text (443) and type=number (472) inputs styled with inputStyle(theme); TextField primitive exists. (Adjacent type=color input at 437 is out of TextField scope.)

verified.canonical_replacement: canonical toggle/SegmentedControl or shared Checkbox primitive

verified.reason: Pattern is real (~26 raw checkboxes) but NO Checkbox/Toggle/Switch primitive exists in primitives.jsx; SegmentedControl is a multi-segment tab control, not a boolean toggle — proposed canonical replacement does not exist.

verified.old_pattern: swatchStyle: border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15)' — hardcoded white-alpha border ignoring theme.border
verified.canonical_replacement: border: `1px solid ${theme.border}`
verified.doctrine_rule: neutral metadata border = theme token; raw color literal breaks in light theme
verified.reason: Confirmed verbatim at line 302; hardcoded white-alpha border is near-invisible in light theme while every sibling border uses theme.border, which is the correct token.

verified.old_pattern: color: "#86837D" hardcoded hex for swing-marker legend swatch
verified.canonical_replacement: theme.textMuted (or the actual settings marker color token)
verified.doctrine_rule: raw hex literal instead of theme/semantic token
verified.reason: #86837D is the ACTUAL rendered swing-marker color (pyrusSignalsPineAdapter.ts draws markers via withHexAlpha('#86837D',...)); this legend swatch must mirror the on-chart color, so replacing it with theme.textMuted would make the legend inaccurate — proposed replacement is wrong.

verified.old_pattern: resolveSolidHex fallback '#808080' hardcoded gray
verified.canonical_replacement: theme-derived neutral token
verified.doctrine_rule: raw hex literal instead of theme token
verified.reason: This is a fallback color VALUE for a hex parser feeding a native <input type=color> the user edits — not UI chrome; a neutral gray value is the correct default and a theme token cannot substitute for a 6-digit hex value here.

verified.old_pattern: headerStyle: backdropFilter: 'blur(10px)' on sticky header
verified.canonical_replacement: drop decorative blur; use solid theme.bg3 surface (surfaceStyle equivalent)
verified.doctrine_rule: REJECT decorative blur/glow layers
verified.reason: Backdrop-blur on a translucent (bg3 alpha 'dd') sticky header is a functional frosted-glass legibility affordance for content scrolling underneath, not the decorative orb/blob/glow layer the doctrine bans.

verified.old_pattern:
No open positions
— bare centered empty text
verified.canonical_replacement: <DataUnavailableState .../> (imported at line 77, already used at 2042/2236 for history/orders tabs in this same file)
verified.doctrine_rule: State coverage: empty states need context + recovery via DataUnavailableState, never bare text
verified.reason: Verified: bare centered 'No open positions' div at 1606; DataUnavailableState exists in primitives and is used by sibling tabs in this same file — inconsistent.

verified.old_pattern: <svg width="100%" height={H} viewBox=...> P&L payoff chart with no aria-label / role / aria-hidden anywhere in file
verified.canonical_replacement: Add role="img" + aria-label describing the payoff (or aria-hidden if paired with a text summary)

verified.reason: Verified: SVG chart at line 143; grep for aria/role across the whole file returned zero matches, so the chart is unlabeled for AT.

verified.old_pattern: three raw <button> OPEN/HIST/ORDERS with inline color: tab===... ? text : textMuted and borderBottom 2px solid accent/transparent toggle styling
verified.canonical_replacement: SegmentedControl (exported at primitives.jsx:1273) — canonical toggle group
verified.doctrine_rule: SegmentedControl replaces raw toggle/tab styling hand-rolled with inline active-state color + underline
verified.reason: Verified: raw buttons with inline active-color + borderBottom underline toggling `tab` state; SegmentedControl exists as the canonical replacement (inline count spans can render as segment labels).

verified.doctrine_rule: surfaceStyle()/Card replace hand-rolled inline bg/border status surfaces (semantic amber tone is correct)
verified.reason: Verified: hand-rolled inline amber bg/border/color surface; amber tone is semantically correct, but surface styling should route through surfaceStyle()/Card. Corrected replacement away from Pill/Badge since content is a full notice message, not a chip.

verified.old_pattern: info.chg >= 0 ? "▲ +" : "▼ -" triangle arrows for quote price-change, colored green/red
verified.canonical_replacement: none — BigDirectionGlyph/VerdictGlyph encode buy/sell market intent, not P&L up/down; no fitting primitive exists for a gain/loss delta arrow
verified.doctrine_rule: green/red here is gain/loss (correct); signal-language glyphs are for directional buy/sell verdict, not price change
verified.reason: Rejected: green/red is correct per +P&L/gain rule; the ▲▼ encodes price gain/loss, and BigDirectionGlyph/VerdictGlyph explicitly encode direction='buy'/'sell' market intent, so the proposed replacement is semantically wrong and no canonical gain/loss glyph exists.

verified.old_pattern: two centered amber text divs ('IBKR is configured, but live positions stay hidden...' / '...no IBKR account is active yet') as partial/blocked-state messages
verified.canonical_replacement: DataUnavailableState variant="warning" with `action` recovery affordance (amber; supported via DATA_STATE_VARIANT_TONES.warning)
verified.doctrine_rule: State coverage: partial/blocked states should use DataUnavailableState with recovery, not bare centered text
verified.reason: Verified: two hand-rolled centered amber text partial-state divs at ~1559+; DataUnavailableState supports a warning (amber) variant and an action prop for recovery, so it is a real canonical replacement.

verified.old_pattern: raw <input type="number"> with hand-rolled inline style (height/padding/border/bg/borderRadius/color) plus a separate <label> caption at L300-311 and a manual hint/error line at L337-361 showing distance/risk or wrongSide message
verified.canonical_replacement: TextField primitive (exports label, hint, error, type, leadingIcon/trailingNode) — replaces the whole label+input+hint/error block; pass error={wrongSide ? wrongSideMessage : undefined} and hint for the Distance/Risk line; preserve the tall/right-aligned numeric look via style/inputProps
verified.doctrine_rule: SegmentedControl / TextField / Select -> replace raw <input>/<select> styling
verified.reason: Confirmed: L312 is a raw <input> plus a manually built label (L300) and hint/error line (L337); TextField exists at primitives.jsx:1411 with label/hint/error/type props and shares the same token system.

verified.canonical_replacement: surfaceStyle({ elevated: true }) or Card — NOTE the real signature is {radius, border(retired), elevated}; it has NO level/elevation/accent params and forces border:none (accent strokes retired by D3), so the tone border would be dropped; it maxes at ELEVATION.sm not lg
verified.doctrine_rule: surfaceStyle() / Card / SurfacePanel -> replaces inline bg-/border-/shadow- surface styling
verified.reason: Pattern is real at L209-214 and surfaceStyle/Card exist, but the finder's params (level/elevation:'lg'/accent) do not exist — corrected to surfaceStyle({elevated:true})/Card; the tone accent border and lg shadow are not reproducible, which is exactly the D3 stroke-retirement the migration wants.

verified.old_pattern: context info panel nested inside the dialog hand-rolls an inset surface: background: CSS_COLOR.bg0, border: 1px solid CSS_COLOR.borderLight, borderRadius: dim(RADII.sm)
verified.canonical_replacement: none that reproduces a recessed bg0 inset — surfaceStyle()/Card both hardcode background:CSS_COLOR.bg1 and have no level/bg0 option, so the proposed surfaceStyle({level:0}) does not exist and would invert the recessed look
verified.doctrine_rule: surfaceStyle() / SurfacePanel -> replaces inline surface styling and surface-in-surface nesting
verified.reason: Rejected: surfaceStyle (primitives.jsx:1882) hardcodes background bg1 and takes no level/accent param, so it cannot produce this recessed bg0 metadata strip; the proposed canonical replacement does not exist and a small inline key-value grid is a legitimate recessed data zone.

verified.canonical_replacement: StatTile (label/value/tone, vertical stacked layout matches QuoteStrip) or MetricChip (label/value/tone/title) — both exist at primitives.jsx:846/925 and reproduce the tone-tinted border+bg tile with tooltip
verified.doctrine_rule: Pill / Badge / StatusPill / MetricChip and StatTile -> replace ad-hoc status/label/metric tiles
verified.reason: Confirmed: L100-138 hand-rolls a tone-tinted bordered label+value tile with an AppTooltip, duplicating MetricChip/StatTile; StatTile's vertical label-over-value layout is the closest match, MetricChip the inline alternative.

verified.reason: This is a fundamental-ratio trend arrow colored green=good/red=bad (health semantics, green is CORRECT), the ▲/▼ shape is a non-color cue, and the named signal-language primitives encode buy/sell verdicts, not ratio trends — no valid canonical replacement exists.

CLASSIFICATION JUDGMENT: directional-green drift is an app-wide KNOWN theme (fixed 4x: FLOW-01/ALG-01/ALG-03/BT-01) but the Market sites (ranks 1-5,12) are marked 'new' not 'systemic-known' because Market's audit never reviewed directional color at all — genuinely undiscovered, unlike Flow's OrderFlowVisuals which are stragglers of the audited-and-fixed FLOW-01 effort. CONFLICT: GEX ranks 9-10 are marked 'new' but directly contradict the GEX audit, which recorded the heatmap green<->red as an ALLOWED diverging data-viz scale with aria-hidden+text-labelled swatches — surfaced for a doctrine tie-break, do not auto-apply.

synthesis.completeness_notes: Watch-items for the fix crew: (1) Two findings need a DOCTRINE DECISION before any code change, not a mechanical swap — GEX HeatmapColorLegend green Call-heavy/magnitude (ranks 9-10) which the GEX audit explicitly deemed allowed diverging data-viz, and ContractDetailInline:990 sentiment (rank 11 / FLOW-03) which the Flow audit deliberately deferred as 'is news-sentiment directional intent?'. Resolve the tie-break first.
